table_name: Observed Condition Input - HV Switchgear (GM) - Primary: Indoor Environment

rows.description: This is an environment which is typified as dry and has a degree of background heating or dehumidification which maintains this year round.
Heating or dehumidification faulty; room temperature is hotter than recommended by environmental policy; condensation evident in switch room etc.

The substation is showing major signs of dampness such as definite water marks around the building, significant amount of flaking paint and/or mould growth. No environmental controls (such as heating or dehumidification) are installed, or the installed environmental controls are not functioning adequately; room temperature is excessively hot; roof or structure permits water ingress; water stands in trenches or free water is observed in the switch room.
